rationale: No conflict. Educ. Code §21.465 governs optional salary incentives for teachers completing autism training. It is unrelated to the homestead exemption amount in Tax Code §11.13(b).
quote: Sec. 21.465. AUTISM TRAINING. (a) A school district may provide a salary incentive or similar compensation to a teacher who completes training provided by a regional education service center relating to autism.
_note: Rule text concerns teacher autism training incentives; no fiscal or operational linkage to homestead exemption levels.
